description: Where the deep blue kingdom releases its treasures skyward, jellyfish drift as luminous lanterns and fish shimmer like wishes set free from the coral gardens below.

learnings.pattern_analysis: Jellyfish naturally embody the balloon metaphor with their dome shapes and trailing tentacles acting as balloon strings. Grouping coral as clustered balloon formations creates organic density at the ocean floor while fish as individual balloon forms provide dynamic movement through the mid-waters.
learnings.color_notes: The warm-cool palette creates visual depth: warm oranges and reds pop forward while cool teals and blues recede, establishing natural layering. The dark #1A1A2E background with subtle blue gradient evokes deep ocean while making the bright balloon creatures glow with bioluminescent quality.
learnings.animation_insights: Staggered delays (0s to 2s) prevent synchronized movement that would feel mechanical. Different animation types per creature class add variety: jellyfish float vertically, fish drift diagonally, coral pulses in place. The sway animation on tentacles creates secondary motion that enhances the underwater illusion.
learnings.composition_principles: The 40% negative space rule is achieved by concentrating elements in three clusters (left, center, right) with generous gaps between. Vertical distribution places coral at bottom, fish in middle, and jellyfish rising toward top, creating upward buoyant energy that matches the celebration theme.
